'''Sladak''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Jedi Initiate/Legends|Jedi Initiate]] serving the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] briefly during the [[Ruusan campaign]] at the end of the [[New Sith Wars]].

==Biography==
A [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] [[Human/Legends|Human]], Sladak and his sister [[Slatka]] were native to a seafaring world without forests. In [[1000 BBY/Legends|1000 BBY]], the siblings were [[Jedi recruiter|recruited]] into the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order's]] [[Army of Light/Legends|Army of Light]] by [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Torr Snapit]] to augment the Army's forces on [[Ruusan/Legends|Ruusan]]. While descending through Ruusan's atmosphere, Snapit's ship was attacked by [[Buzzard (starfighter)|Sith Buzzards]] of the [[Brotherhood of Darkness/Legends|Brotherhood of Darkness]] and ultimately destroyed. As the ship broke apart, both Sladak and Slatka were killed before ever receiving anything more than rudimentary training.
